reason: Successfully sent a math question to the QA-20260708-211001-te5n agent and verified it received the correct response "4"

Step 2: Found and clicked "QA-20260708-211001-te5n" agent in the sidebar — Agent detail page loaded, URL changed to /agents/qa-20260708-211001-te5n-rgqa5tbe8s
